description_long: This rifle features a robust, elongated black metal barrel paired with a wooden stock and grip, giving it a classic yet tactical appearance. The receiver is substantial, with a drum magazine mounted beneath, suggesting a high-capacity, rapid-fire capability. The stock is fixed and made of polished wood, providing stability and traditional aesthetics. The fore-end and barrel are matte black, with a front sight post visible at the muzzle. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined, and the overall construction appears solid and durable. The combination of wood and metal materials, along with the drum magazine, makes this rifle stand out as both functional and visually striking.
description: A long, black rifle with a wooden fixed stock and a prominent drum magazine, featuring a matte barrel and classic design elements.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular opening of the barrel and a narrow profile.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the wooden stock, large drum magazine, and the length of the black barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the wooden buttstock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same key features: wooden stock, drum magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
